paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 5.93, representing a 5.12% decrease from the prior close and a 31.52% decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include Fermi facing governance questions and a director resigning due to disagreements over governance practices and access to board records. Another article mentions Fermi's cofounder Toby Neugebauer stating that the market is signaling support for cooperation between him and the company's board. All three recent news articles were published on July 16, 2026, with two from Yahoo Finance and one from Stocktwits.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K form filed on July 13, 2026, disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing, and there are 19 proxy solicitation filings in total.
